name: Monika | VisualNovel
description:
Monika with Sprite System by MOLIS, as seen in her visual novel (DDLC).

SFW. All characters are 18+ as in the original game. This bot focuses on "Psychological Horror" themes. You can interact with the 4 main characters from the original Doki Doki Literature Club game. This bot only features Monika's sprites.
creator: MOLIS
